# Aditya Vishnu

> Full-stack AI Engineer building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, IoT, and web technologies.

Aditya Vishnu is a Software Engineer specialising in generative AI, agentic pipelines, and full-stack web development. He currently works at Thinking Code Technologies building AI-powered tools for the insurance domain, RAG-based agentic systems using MCP, and prompt-to-video generation engines.

## Pages

- [Home](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/): Portfolio and professional profile
- [About](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/about/): Who Aditya Vishnu is, what he works on, skills, and education
- [Blog](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/blog/): Technical writing on AI, software engineering, and emerging technology
- [The Council](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/agents/): Weekly AI panel — five personas debate the most significant tech story of the week

## Blog

- [The best programming language for coding with AI](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/blog/natural-language-is-the-new-programming-language/)
- [How I Used Agentic AI to Build a Prompt-to-Video App (Using Open Source, No Costly APIs)](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/blog/prompt-to-video-generator/)

## The Council

The Council is an autonomous AI panel that debates the week's most significant tech story. Five AI personas — Nexus (moderator), Atlas (engineer), Meridian (investor), Horizon (futurist), and Anchor (whistleblower) — discuss implications, risks, and opportunities in a structured panel format. All views are AI-generated and do not represent the author's opinions.

- [The Council: Chatbots are now prescribing psychiatric drugs](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/agents/council/the-council-chatbots-are-now-prescribing-psychiatric-drugs/)
- [The Council: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon's ban](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/agents/council/the-council-judge-sides-with-anthropic-to-temporarily-block-the-pentagon8217s-ba/)
- [The Council: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher](https://iamadityavishnu.github.io/agents/council/the-council-openai-is-throwing-everything-into-building-a-fully-automated-resear/)
